message:
test(bd-274qo): implement perf regression CI gate tests

24 tests validating the regression gate mechanism:
- Baseline JSON parsing and schema validation (3 tests)
- Regression threshold logic: mean 1.10x, p95 1.15x, p99 1.25x (8 tests)
- Edge cases: zero baselines, empty reports, missing benchmarks (5 tests)
- Report formatting and JSON artifact roundtrip (3 tests)
- Smoke tests with synthetic data verifying gate behavior (2 tests)
- On-disk baseline conformance self-check (2 tests)
- Custom threshold configuration (1 test)

Tests are deterministic and fast (no actual benchmarks run).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
